items.title: Complete MCP inventory documented
items.description: Configs, transports, owners, and credential scope for every server.
items.how_to_find: MCP review (Inventory and Configuration): inventory all hosts (Cursor, Claude Desktop, LiteLLM, custom agents). Configs, transports, owners, and credential scope for every server. Grep configs for `command`, `args`, `env`, and remote URLs. Probe HTTP MCP with unauthenticated tools/list. Review tool descriptions for hidden instructions.
items.how_to_fix: Allowlist STDIO launchers, pin package versions, sandbox each server, scope credentials per tool, require auth on remote MCP, human-in-the-loop for destructive actions, patch CVE-2026-30623 / MCPoison / Inspector issues, and alert on new MCP child processes.
